results.summary: Consensus: Strong Buy. Average PT ranges $357-$385 depending on source (37-68 analysts). Median PT $375. Low $190, High $465. PT revised upward ~13.71% over past 3 months. Key drivers: advertising spend recovery, Google Cloud AI adoption surge, massive capex investment being assessed for long-term ROI.
